content:
# Session 31 ‚Äî Iter-021 Prover Round (Path-2 Mayer-Vietoris LES Connecting Homomorphism: `HModule'_Œ¥`)

## Metadata

- **Archon iteration**: 021 (canonical) ‚Äî Path-2 Mayer-Vietoris LES *connecting homomorphism*: a single new `noncomputable def HModule'_Œ¥` providing the boundary map of the LES at adjacent degrees `(n‚ÇÄ, n‚ÇÅ)` with `n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ`. Body: `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom ((HModule'_shortComplex_shortExact k S).extClass.precomp _ (by omega))`. Direct mirror of Mathlib `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/SheafCohomology/MayerVietoris.lean` L112‚Äì114 with the single value-category substitution `AddCommGrpCat.free ‚Üí ModuleCat.free k`. **No new Mathlib gap-fill** (in contrast to iter-019's `IsLeftAdjoint` and iter-020's `PreservesMonomorphisms`): `Ext.precomp` and `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom` are both Mathlib-native and value-category-agnostic.
- **Session number**: 31 (prover-round counter ‚Äî sessions 22‚Äì31 cover iter-012 through iter-021 respectively).
- **Stage**: prover (single-lane, on `AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean`).
- **Sorry count before this session**: 9 (5 `Jacobian.lean` + 3 `AbelJacobi.lean` + 1 `Picard/Functor.lean`).
- **Sorry count after this session**: 9 (unchanged at the project level ‚Äî same distribution; the iter-021 plan trajectory was `9 ‚Üí 10 ‚Üí 9` but the refactor sub-phase did not produce a transient `:= by sorry` site, so the project-level count never lifted to 10. The new declaration was added with its closure body in a single Edit ‚Äî **seventh consecutive recurrence** of the iter-015 / iter-016 / iter-017 / iter-018 / iter-019 / iter-020 collapse pattern, pre-authorised by PROGRESS.md L43‚Äì51 as "acceptable ‚Äî the end-state is what matters").
- **Targets attempted**: 1 (`AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule'_Œ¥`).
- **Targets solved**: 1.
- **First-edit closure rate**: 100% (1/1). The streak of 100%-first-edit closure resumes at fifteen rounds (iter-006 through iter-021, with the iter-020 cosmetic touch-up on a parser-grammar idiosyncrasy noted as the only blip).
- **New `axiom` declarations**: 0.
- **Files edited**: 1 (`AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean`).
- **Pre-processed events** (`attempts_raw.jsonl`): 17 events ‚Äî 1 Edit (appended the new declaration with closure body inlined; ~36 LOC added including 27-line docstring), 3 `lean_diagnostic_messages` calls (all clean post-Edit on `StructureSheafModuleK.lean` and `Genus.lean`), 1 `lean_verify` axiom check (kernel-only ‚Äî `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, plus the harmless L397 `local instance` heuristic match from the iter-019 docstring), 1 sorry-analyzer call (`9 total across 3 file(s)` post-Edit), 1 task-result write, 3 file reads, 1 `lake build` invocation (succeeded ‚Äî 8319 jobs), 6 incidental tool / shell calls. No `lean_goal` queries (the body was probe-confirmed by the iter-021 plan agent and dropped in verbatim ‚Äî same pattern as iter-014‚Äìiter-020).

## Targets

### Target 1 ‚Äî `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule'_Œ¥`

**File**: `AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean`, lines 564‚Äì599 (docstring start) ‚Äì (def body terminator).
**Status**: SOLVED (first-edit, term-mode one-line body).
**Significance**: The connecting homomorphism `Œ¥ : H‚Åø‚Å∞(S.X‚ÇÅ) ‚ü∂ H‚Åø¬π(S.X‚ÇÑ)` of the Mayer-Vietoris long exact sequence in `ModuleCat k`-valued sheaf cohomology. Direct mirror of Mathlib `MayerVietorisSquare.Œ¥` (`Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/SheafCohomology/MayerVietoris.lean` L112‚Äì114) for the `ModuleCat k` flavor. Consumes iter-020's `HModule'_shortComplex_shortExact` (via the `extClass` accessor on `ShortExact`) and iter-016's `HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf` (for the codomain typing). Will be consumed by iter-022+ when scaffolding the `ComposableArrows`-form LES sequence `HModule'_sequence` and downstream by iter-023+ for the iso to `Ext.contravariantSequence`.

#### Goal at the body site (post-iter-021-refactor, expected by directive)

The directive's two-phase plan would have produced the transient sorry-state:

```lean
noncomputable def HModule'_Œ¥
    (k : Type u) [Field k]
    {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
    [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
    [HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
    (S : J.MayerVietorisSquare) (F : Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))
    (n‚ÇÄ n‚ÇÅ : ‚Ñï) (h : n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ) :
    (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÄ).obj (Opposite.op S.X‚ÇÅ) ‚ü∂
      (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÅ).obj (Opposite.op S.X‚ÇÑ) := by sorry
```

‚Äî but the prover skipped that intermediate state and went straight to the closed body, exactly as in iter-015 / iter-016 / iter-017 / iter-018 / iter-019 / iter-020. Plan-agent pre-authorised the collapse in PROGRESS.md L43‚Äì51.

#### Attempt 1 (succeeded)

- **Strategy**: Adopt the probe-confirmed term-mode one-line body verbatim from `REFACTOR_DIRECTIVE.md` (and PROGRESS.md L93). The body is `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom ((HModule'_shortComplex_shortExact k S).extClass.precomp _ (by omega))`. The `:= by` is dropped ‚Äî the body is a single term, not a tactic block (mirror of Mathlib L113‚Äì114).
- **Code tried** (Edit 1; lines 564‚Äì599 of the post-Edit file, including the 27-line docstring at L564‚Äì589 and the 10-line declaration at L590‚Äì599):

  ```lean
  /-- Phase A step 6 *Path 2* (iter-021): the connecting homomorphism `Œ¥` of the
  Mayer-Vietoris long exact sequence in `ModuleCat k`-valued sheaf cohomology.
  For a Mayer-Vietoris square `S` and adjacent cohomological degrees `n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ`,
  the morphism
    Œ¥ : (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÄ).obj (op S.X‚ÇÅ) ‚ü∂
          (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÅ).obj (op S.X‚ÇÑ)
  in `AddCommGrpCat` is the precomposition with the extension class
  `(HModule'_shortComplex_shortExact k S).extClass : Ext (...X‚ÇÅ...) (...X‚ÇÉ...) 1`
  followed by `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom` to wrap the resulting `AddMonoidHom` as a
  categorical morphism. Direct mirror of Mathlib's `MayerVietorisSquare.Œ¥`
  (`Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Sites/SheafCohomology/MayerVietoris.lean` L112‚Äì114)
  for the `ModuleCat k` flavor with `AddCommGrpCat.free ‚Üí ModuleCat.free k`.

  The `[HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]` typeclass is required (the
  `Ext.precomp` operation depends on it) and matches the corresponding
  requirement on iter-016 `HModule'_cohomologyPresheafFunctor` / `..._cohomologyPresheaf`,
  iter-017 `HModule'_toBiprod` / `..._fromBiprod`, and iter-018
  `HModule'_toBiprod_fromBiprod`.

  This connecting hom is the missing third link of the Mayer-Vietoris exact
  sequence: combined with iter-017's `toBiprod` (sum of restriction) and
  `fromBiprod` (difference of restriction), iter-018's `toBiprod ‚â´ fromBiprod = 0`,
  and the iter-022+ packaging into a `ComposableArrows`-form sequence + iter-023+
  sequence-iso to `Ext.contravariantSequence` + iter-024+ exactness theorem, it
  will yield the full LES `... ‚Üí H‚Åø(X‚ÇÑ) ‚Üí H‚Åø(X‚ÇÇ) ‚äû H‚Åø(X‚ÇÉ) ‚Üí H‚Åø(X‚ÇÅ) ‚Üí H‚Åø‚Å∫¬π(X‚ÇÑ) ‚Üí ...`
  in `ModuleCat k`-valued sheaf cohomology. -/
  noncomputable def HModule'_Œ¥
      (k : Type u) [Field k]
      {C : Type v} [Category.{u, v} C] {J : GrothendieckTopology C}
      [HasWeakSheafify J (Type u)] [HasSheafify J (ModuleCat.{u} k)]
      [HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]
      (S : J.MayerVietorisSquare) (F : Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))
      (n‚ÇÄ n‚ÇÅ : ‚Ñï) (h : n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ) :
      (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÄ).obj (Opposite.op S.X‚ÇÅ) ‚ü∂
        (HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n‚ÇÅ).obj (Opposite.op S.X‚ÇÑ) :=
    AddCommGrpCat.ofHom ((HModule'_shortComplex_shortExact k S).extClass.precomp _ (by omega))
  ```

- **`lean_diagnostic_messages` post-Edit**: `{success: true, items: [], failed_dependencies: []}` ‚Äî zero errors, zero warnings.
- **`lean_verify` post-Edit**: `{axioms: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound], warnings: [(line: 397, pattern: "local instance")]}` ‚Äî kernel-only axioms; the L397 warning is the harmless source-scan heuristic match on the iter-019 `ModuleCat_free_isLeftAdjoint` instance docstring text "project-local instance" (documented; not a true `local instance` declaration).
- **Goal before**: (none, since the body is term-mode ‚Äî there is no proof state).
- **Goal after**: (none).
- **Result**: success.
- **Key insight**: When the connecting hom is a value-category-agnostic Mathlib idiom (here `Ext.precomp` + `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom`), the directive's two-phase scaffold-then-fill plan compresses to a single Edit. The `[HasExt (Sheaf J (ModuleCat.{u} k))]` typeclass is **load-bearing** (probe-verified by the iter-021 plan-agent: without it the body fails with `failed to synthesize ‚àÄ (X Y : Sheaf J (ModuleCat k)) (a b : ‚Ñ§), Localization.HasSmallLocalizedHom (...) ...`); it matches the typeclass list of iter-016/017/018. The codomain `(HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n).obj (Opposite.op X)` lands in `AddCommGrpCat` (forced by Mathlib's `Abelian.extFunctor n` always landing there, regardless of `Linear k` enrichment); the morphism `HModule'_Œ¥ k S F n‚ÇÄ n‚ÇÅ h` is therefore an `AddCommGrpCat`-morphism, hence the outer `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom` wrapping. The `.extClass.precomp` dot-notation chain works through `CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext.precomp` automatically and does not require manual `Abelian.` qualification. The arithmetic discharge `(by omega)` handles the `1 + n‚ÇÄ = n‚ÇÅ` side-condition derived from the standing `n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ`.

#### Verification (this session)

1. **`lean_diagnostic_messages` on `AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean`**: `{success: true, items: [], failed_dependencies: []}`. Zero warnings, zero errors.
2. **`lean_verify AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule'_Œ¥`**: `{axioms: [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound], warnings: [(line: 397, pattern: "local instance")]}`. Kernel-only.
3. **Sorry count**: `9 total across 3 file(s)` (5 `Jacobian.lean` + 3 `AbelJacobi.lean` + 1 `Picard/Functor.lean`; `Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean` is **not** in the list ‚Äî 0 sorries).
4. **`Genus.lean`**: `lean_diagnostic_messages` returns `{success: true, items: [], failed_dependencies: []}` ‚Äî iter-011 honest closure of `AlgebraicGeometry.genus` intact. `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.StructureSheafModuleK` succeeded (8319 jobs).
5. **Trajectory**: sorry count `9 ‚Üí 9` (single-Edit collapse; the transient `9 ‚Üí 10 ‚Üí 9` shape pre-authorised by the directive was not entered).

## Key findings / proof patterns

### Confirmed patterns

- **Probe-confirmed bodies adopted verbatim have ~100% first-edit reliability** at the semantic content level ‚Äî sessions 12, 13, 14, 15, 20, 21, 22, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31 ‚Äî **fifteen** consecutive rounds of 100% semantic first-edit closure rate. Iter-021 had no parser-grammar idiosyncrasy (unlike iter-020), so cosmetic packaging was also first-edit.
- **Refactor + prover sub-phase collapse for narrow probe-confirmed scaffolds in unprotected territory is an extremely strongly recurring execution mode** (sessions 25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31 ‚Äî **seven consecutive occurrences**, generalising across single-`def` / paired-`def` / paired-`def`+`abbrev` / single-`lemma` / triple-`instance`+`lemma`+`def` / quintuple-`instance`+`instance`+`instance`+`lemma`+`lemma` / single-`noncomputable def` shapes).
- **Single-declaration prover round when the body is a value-category-agnostic Mathlib idiom with no Mathlib gap to fill** (added iter-021). Iter-021 has the smallest scope of the iter-014‚Äìiter-021 sequence (1 declaration), which corresponds to the smallest scope of work requiring no new Mathlib gap-fill. Compare: iter-014 / iter-015 / iter-018 (1 declaration with no gap-fill); iter-016 / iter-017 (2 declarations); iter-019 (3 declarations + 1 gap-fill); iter-020 (5 declarations + 1 gap-fill); iter-021 (1 declaration, no gap-fill).
- **`Ext.precomp` + `AddCommGrpCat.ofHom` + `(by omega)` is the canonical Mathlib idiom for a connecting hom in a long exact sequence built from a `ShortExact`** (added iter-021). Mathlib L112‚Äì114 mirrors. Value-category-agnostic given `[HasExt C]`. The `(by omega)` discharges the `a·µíÀ°·µà + n_a·µíÀ°·µà = a‚Åø·µâ ∑` arithmetic side-condition automatically when the standing equation `n‚ÇÄ + 1 = n‚ÇÅ` is in scope.
- **`.extClass.precomp` dot-notation works through `CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext.precomp`** without explicit `Abelian.` qualification (added iter-021). The dot-notation auto-resolves through the underlying type `CategoryTheory.Abelian.Ext`. Sibling to the iter-026 finding that `Abelian.extFunctor` requires manual qualification (because it is the function name being looked up, not a method on a value).
- **`(HModule'_cohomologyPresheaf k F n).obj (Opposite.op X)` as the codomain of a connecting hom in `AddCommGrpCat`** (re-confirmed iter-021). The codomain matches the per-fiber `rfl` identification with `HModule' k F n X` from iter-014, but the surface type is `AddCommGrpCat` ‚Äî the `Module k` recovery is via the iter-014 reducibility, not by changing the categorical morphism's flavor.

### No new dead-ends discovered

The iter-021 round had no parser-grammar surprises and no new dead-ends. The L397 `local instance` heuristic-match warning from `lean_verify`'s source-scan is the same harmless false-positive on the iter-019 docstring text "project-local instance" that has appeared in iter-019 and iter-020.

## Blueprint markers updated

- `Cohomology_StructureSheafModuleK.tex`, `def:Scheme_HModule_prime_delta`: added `\leanok` to the statement block (declaration `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule'_Œ¥` exists at L590 of `StructureSheafModuleK.lean`, file compiles, kernel-only axioms). The proof block already had `\leanok` from the iter-021 plan-agent first pass (line 854 of the chapter file); confirmed unchanged.

No `\mathlibok` markers added (the declaration is project-local, not a Mathlib re-export).
No `\notready` markers stripped (none existed in the chapter).
No `% NOTE:` comments added (no formalization obstacles encountered).
No `\lean{...}` macro corrections (the prover preserved the canonical name `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.HModule'_Œ¥` exactly as the chapter expected; the Greek `Œ¥` is fully UTF-8 supported by both Lean and leanblueprint).

## Recommendations for next session

See `recommendations.md` in this folder for the full briefing. Headline:

- **Track 1 (primary for iter-022)**: scaffold the LES sequence `HModule'_sequence` as a `ComposableArrows`-form 9-term sequence, mirroring Mathlib `MayerVietoris.lean` L120‚Äì122. Estimated 1 declaration, ~10‚Äì15 LOC. Probe-confirmable; consumes iter-021's `HModule'_Œ¥` directly via `S.HModule'_Œ¥ k F n‚ÇÄ n‚ÇÅ h`.
- **Track 1.5 (refactor URGENT, before iter-022 prover lane)**: split `Cohomology/MayerVietoris.lean` from `Cohomology/StructureSheafModuleK.lean` ‚Äî the latter is now ~635 LOC, **~235 LOC over the ~400 LOC threshold** (was 599 LOC pre-iter-021; iter-021 added ~36 LOC). The split deferred from the iter-021 plan-agent first pass (PROJECT_STATUS L41) is now even more urgent.
- **Track 2 (parallel low-coupling)**: **none recommended**. Polish backlog remains empty.
- Do **not** re-issue `representable`, the 8 remaining protected sorries, direct `LineBundle` refinement, or any of the closed scaffold sites. The iter-014 / iter-015 / iter-016 / iter-017 / iter-018 / iter-019 / iter-020 / iter-021 closures are final and go in `task_done.md`.
